mapper.select: SELECT media_id, media_name, media_url, description, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ADS_MEDIA WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY media_name
SELECT media_id, media_name, media_url, description, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ADS_MEDIA ORDER BY media_id DESC
SELECT media_id, media_name, media_url, description, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ADS_MEDIA WHERE media_id = #{mediaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS_MEDIA (media_name, media_url, description, use_yn) VALUES (#{mediaName}, #{mediaUrl}, #{description}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE ADS_MEDIA SET media_name = #{mediaName}, media_url = #{mediaUrl}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE media_id = #{mediaId}
mapper.select: SELECT platform_id, platform_code, platform_name, use_yn, created_at FROM ADS_PLATFORM WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY platform_id
SELECT platform_id, platform_code, platform_name, use_yn, created_at FROM ADS_PLATFORM ORDER BY platform_id DESC
SELECT platform_id, platform_code, platform_name, use_yn, created_at FROM ADS_PLATFORM WHERE platform_id = #{platformId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS_PLATFORM (platform_code, platform_name, use_yn) VALUES (#{platformCode}, #{platformName}, #{useYn})
mapper.select: SELECT p.platform_id, p.platform_code, p.platform_name, p.use_yn, p.created_at FROM ADS_PLATFORM p INNER JOIN ADS_MEDIA_PLATFORM mp ON mp.platform_id = p.platform_id WHERE mp.media_id = #{mediaId} AND mp.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY p.platform_id
SELECT platform_id FROM ADS_MEDIA_PLATFORM WHERE media_id = #{mediaId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS_MEDIA_PLATFORM (media_id, platform_id, use_yn) VALUES (#{mediaId}, #{platformId}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT placement_id, platform_id, placement_code, placement_name, width, height, description, use_yn, created_at FROM ADS_PLACEMENT WHERE platform_id = #{platformId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY placement_id

SELECT pl.placement_id, pl.platform_id, pl.placement_code, pl.placement_name, pl.width, pl.height, pl.description, pl.use_yn, pl.created_at, p.platform_name FROM ADS_PLACEMENT pl LEFT JOIN ADS_PLATFORM p ON p.platform_id = pl.platform_id WHERE pl.platform_id = #{platformId} ORDER BY pl.placement_id DESC

SELECT pl.placement_id, pl.platform_id, pl.placement_code, pl.placement_name, pl.width, pl.height, pl.description, pl.use_yn, pl.created_at, p.platform_name FROM ADS_PLACEMENT pl LEFT JOIN ADS_PLATFORM p ON p.platform_id = pl.platform_id ORDER BY pl.platform_id, pl.placement_id DESC

SELECT pl.placement_id, pl.platform_id, pl.placement_code, pl.placement_name, pl.width, pl.height, pl.description, pl.use_yn, pl.created_at, p.platform_name FROM ADS_PLACEMENT pl LEFT JOIN ADS_PLATFORM p ON p.platform_id = pl.platform_id WHERE pl.placement_id = #{placementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS_PLACEMENT (platform_id, placement_code, placement_name, width, height, description, use_yn) VALUES (#{platformId}, #{placementCode}, #{placementName}, #{width}, #{height}, #{description}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE ADS_PLACEMENT SET platform_id = #{platformId}, placement_code = #{placementCode}, placement_name = #{placementName}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE placement_id = #{placementId}
